Services / Behavioral Health

Behavioral Health

  • Counseling for couples, individuals, families, children, and adolescents
  • Assessment, case management and coordination
  • Substance use treatment
The stresses of life affect each of us in different ways. If habits, worries, or emotional concerns are interfering with your life or overall health, our expert team of behavioral health clinicians are here to help. In keeping with our whole-person approach to care, we work with your primary care physician to find the best treatment for your unique needs, whether you’re struggling with anxiety, depression, substance use, or any other mental health condition. If you need ongoing treatment for a substance use disorder, we have the resources and support you need to face the challenges throughout the recovery process. Our recovery specialists offer personalized care every step of the way.
